column1: flow
homepage -> click impostazioni — type=link; label="no"; explanation="click on the configuration button"
click impostazioni -> apertura pagina impostazioni — type=link; label="si"; explanation="open the configuration page"
apertura pagina impostazioni -> visualizzazione nuovo luogo — type=link; label="no"; explanation="new place visualization"
visualizzazione nuovo luogo -> click sul luogo — type=link; label="si"; explanation="click on the place"
click sul luogo -> apertura pagina luogo dettagliata — type=link; label="si"; explanation="open the place detailed page"
apertura pagina luogo dettagliata -> click pathfinder — type=link; label="no"; explanation="click on the pathfinder"
click pathfinder -> apertura pagina pathfinder — type=link; label="si"; explanation="open the pathfinder page"
apertura pagina pathfinder -> swipe verso fatto — type=link; label="no"; explanation="swipe done"

flow 1: homepage -> click impostazioni -> apertura pagina impostazioni -> visualizzazione nuovo luogo -> click sul luogo -> apertura pagina luogo dettagliata -> click pathfinder -> apertura pagina pathfinder -> swipe verso fatto

the diagram models a sequence of actions starting from the homepage, where the user can click on the configuration button to open the configuration page, then visualize a new place, click on it, open the place detailed page, click on the pathfinder, open the pathfinder page, and finally swipe to confirm.
the user can choose to click on the configuration button or the place, and the system will respond accordingly.
the user can also choose to click on the pathfinder or the place detailed page, and the system will respond accordingly.
the user can also choose to swipe to confirm or not, and the system will respond accordingly.
pagina dettagliata -> apertura mappa di sistema - type=transition; label="si"; explanation="open system map"
apertura mappa di sistema -> apertura sito yelp sul browser - type=transition; label="si"; explanation="open yelp site on browser"
apertura sito yelp sul browser -> avvio chiamata al business - type=transition; label="si"; explanation="start call to business"
avvio chiamata al business -> ritorno ad homepage - type=transition; label="si"; explanation="return to homepage"
ritorno ad homepage -> modifica preferenze - type=transition; label="si"; explanation="modify preferences"
modifica preferenze -> pagina dettagliata - type=transition; label="si"; explanation="modify preferences"
flow 1: pagina dettagliata -> apertura mappa di sistema -> apertura sito yelp sul browser -> avvio chiamata al business -> ritorno ad homepage -> modifica preferenze -> pagina dettagliata
the diagram models a sequence of actions performed by a user on a webpage.
the main flows represent the user's navigation through the system, starting from the page and ending with the modification of preferences.
the conditions/branches represent the user's choices and actions, such as navigating, opening the browser, calling a business, and liking or disliking something.
the diagram does not show any loops or repetitions.
apertura pagina pathfinder -> click "indietro" - type=transition; label="si"; explanation=go back to home page
click "indietro" -> visualizzazione domanda - type=transition; label="no"; explanation=show demand visualization
visualizzazione domanda -> scelta risposta - type=transition; label="suggerimento disponibile"; explanation=show suggested response
scelta risposta -> visualizzazione luogo suggerito - type=transition; label="suggerimento non disponibile"; explanation=show suggested location
flow 1: apertura pagina pathfinder -> click "indietro" -> visualizzazione domanda -> scelta risposta -> visualizzazione luogo suggerito

the diagram models the flow of a user navigating through a website, starting with the opening of the pathfinder page, followed by a decision to go back to the home page or proceed to the demand visualization, and then selecting a response and viewing the suggested location.
the user can only proceed to the next step if the response is available, otherwise, they are shown a non-availability message.
the diagram does not show any loops or repeated behavior.
